questions.question: Beginning in 1977, what do Anthony Daniels, Kenny Baker, and Peter Mahew have in common?
questions.answer: They all were in Star Wars

questions.question: Named after its founder, what company's TV ads sold numerous products such as Veg-O-Matic, Mr. Microphone, and Ginsu Knives?
What 1977 cover by Shaun Cassidy included the lyrics, "I met her on a Monday and my heart stood still."?
What famous school teacher was on board the Challenger space shuttle when it exploded after take off in 1986?
What did it mean to "go postal"?
questions.answer: Extreme anger; arbitrarily firing into a random group of people
